text.message: Not sure why you keep coming after me oj
I haven't even built a road
I strike from red I strike from blue and I strike from you
but you blocked me every chance you got
I don’t know what you’re talking about
ok - maybe I read it wrong
Look at the boards like really just take a second. Where do I put it where I’m not solo blocking someone that isn’t on you
and you didn't block red until after she settled
oh yeah - that's true about the 8
Where would block red where I wasn’t soloing him
Like just take a second for breather lol
Red on atkeast 7 with almost road and open settle
I need to take road or blue win
Then his 5 wheat is the block
Orange I have brick if you need road
If I don’t take road red wins next round
How am I the block and steal now
Red like to yap a lot
Then you have a mono and that’s even worse
I mean I am on 6 points
I think it was only 1 wood
lol red is mad because we didn’t let him when we he was at 8 with a mono
